name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Management Role Assignment Removed (Office 365)
notes: This Building Block identifies when a management role was removed from a management role group, management role assignment policy, user, or universal security group (USG).
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Management Role Assignment Removed (Office 365) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365
when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.Policy Removed, Authentication.Role Unassignment Success
when the event matches Policy Name (custom) is not N/A
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Management Role Assignment Removed (Office 365) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.Policy Removed, Authentication.Role Unassignment Success
AND when the event matches Policy Name (custom) is not N/A
